schema.description: The error response body returned when JWT validation or OPA authorization fails.

type.description: The category of the error encountered during the middleware lifecycle.

details.description: A descriptive message providing technical context for the failure.

custom_message.description: An optional, developer-defined message, often populated by OPA policy violations.
